style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift lazily upward, each particle refracting soft pastel light like captured rainbows. An ethereal glow of pale lavender radiates from Gengar's body, casting a gentle luminescence that pulses softly with each movement. Petal-shaped aura particles float in delicate spirals around its form, refracting light into shimmering prismatic hues. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
